query:
-- Get steps 14 onwards from last completed run (Apollo steps)
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[14]') as step15,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[15]') as step16_gapfill,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[16]') as step17_backfill,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[17]') as step18_manual,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[18]') as step19,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[19]') as step20
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE status = 'completed'
ORDER BY startedAt DESC LIMIT 1;

  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[17]') as step18_manual,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[18]') as step19,
  JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[19]') as step20
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE status = 'completed'
